name: Trade Flow Exhaustion into Stable Book (Tighter)
hypothesis: An even more extreme burst of buyer-initiated trades (z-score > 3.5) into a deep, stable order book (low BBO concentration on both sides) is a stronger signal of absorption and imminent price reversal downwards.
mutation_note: Follows `tighten_threshold` feedback. Increases the `zscore(trade_imbalance_signed, 300)` threshold from 3.0 to 3.5 to isolate higher-conviction exhaustion events and improve consistency.
